description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a weathered, two-tone exterior featuring a gray upper section and a rusty red lower section. The front face displays a circular illuminated sign on top, a coin slot, a product retrieval slot, and a faded label reading '10¢'. The left side is marked with the words 'ICE COLD' and shows some surface wear, while the right side has a faint inscription and a protruding box-like structure. The back is plain, with no visible openings or features. The machine's surface appears metallic and aged, with visible rust and grime, suggesting long-term outdoor use. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century soda vending machines, with retro branding and mechanical payment and retrieval interfaces.
description: A weathered, retro-style vending machine with a gray and rusty red exterior, illuminated sign, and coin-operated interface. Features include a coin slot, retrieval slot, and faded branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated circular sign, coin slot, product retrieval slot, and faded '10¢' label.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the 'ICE COLD' text and some surface wear, with no visible interactive components.
description_view_2: Rear view, plain and featureless, showing only the two-tone color scheme and the back of the illuminated sign.
description_view_3: Right side view with a faint inscription and a protruding box-like structure, no visible interactive elements.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular area on the front, above the coin slot, with faded printed instructions and a '10¢' label.
attribute_payment_interface: Coin slot located on the front, above the retrieval slot, with a visible coin return area.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A single button or lever on the front, below the coin slot, used for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: Rectangular slot on the lower front, large enough for a can or bottle, with a recessed opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Circular illuminated sign on top with a red and white logo, faded '10¢' label, and retro-style text reading 'ICE COLD' and other inscriptions on the sides.
